title: [Skyship, Core]
description: Myriad cylinders flank the walkway, extending from beneath the floor and connecting to the ceiling.  Crafted from a transparent glaesine, each cylinder is filled with a swirling, opaque mixture that appears like highly viscous, ethereal sea water in a variety of bright colors.  Glaesine pipes attached to these cylinders line the ceiling and carry into the distance in all directions, going along the walkway and through the hull, carrying the liquid elsewhere on the ship.
